name: Willow Creek Golf Course
address: 140 SE Willow Creek Dr, West Des Moines, IA 50265
about: Willow Creek Golf Course offers a comprehensive golf experience with a 27-hole course designed for all skill levels. The facility includes a driving range for practice, a pro shop with equipment and fitting services, and on-site dining options. They also feature two TrackMan golf simulators available for use, particularly during the off-season, providing an alternative golfing experience. The venue offers various membership packages, lessons, and event hosting capabilities for tournaments and weddings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for accurate simulation and practice
Comprehensive pro shop with certified club-fitting experts
Full-service bar and food options available on-site
27-hole scenic course designed to improve the game

food_and_drink.notes: Clubhouse features a full-service bar with deli sandwiches, hot dogs, and snacks
Full-service bar available, open daily based on golf course hours

simulator_hardware.notes: Two bays available; one for left- and right-handed golfers, one right-handed only

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them from the pro shop, which offers a selection of clubs for purchase or rental. Certified club-fitting experts are available to help match the right equipment to your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The clubhouse features a full-service bar with deli sandwiches, hot dogs, and snacks available for purchase. Outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The cost is $40 per hour for the TrackMan simulators, with two bays available. Session duration would depend on how many holes you play within your booked time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Willow Creek offers quality instructional programs for youth and families, with a variety of amenities suitable for different age groups.
